text: The attorney general shall assist a board in the enforcement of this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 61. Compulsory Pilotage
##### § 61.007 — Attorney General

The attorney general shall assist a board in the enforcement of this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The attorney general shall assist a board in the enforcement of this chapter.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
